evidence_summary: Ground the narrative in a naturalistic reality to provide a thematic epilogue following the surrealism of the dream world.

Alice wakes up on the riverbank, back to her normal size. She tells her sister about the dream. As they sit together at sunset, the sister reflects on how the sounds of the real world echo the strange sounds of Wonderland.
From the disorientation of waking to a peaceful, reflective calm.
Alice wakes up on the riverbank, disoriented by her return to normal size.
A peaceful moment of reflection as the sun sets over the riverbank.
Alice wakes and recounts her dream while sitting with her sister at sunset.
